name: Apple-Raisin Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Core, peel, and chop 2 apples to make 1 1/2 cups.
2. Cream butter and sugar until smooth.
3. Add eggs and milk; beat well.
4. Stir together flour, baking powder, cinnamon, salt, nutmeg, and ground cloves.
5. Gradually stir the dry ingredients into the creamed mixture.
6. Mix in the chopped apples, raisins, and walnuts.
7. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls of dough onto a greased cookie sheet.
8. Bake at 350°F for 12 to 14 minutes.
9. Remove cookies immediately from the baking sheet and place on a rack.
